_meta.name: okta-revoke-app-from-user
_meta.description: Revoke (deassign) an application from an Okta user. Navigates to the user's Applications tab, finds the app, and clicks the remove/deassign action.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14
_meta.warning: Destructive action — removes app access. User will lose access to the app immediately.

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active.

app_name.description: Display name of the application to revoke

anomalies: Remove action on app row may be a gear icon → Remove Assignment, or an inline X
Apps assigned via group (not direct assignment) cannot be removed from user profile — must remove via group
Group-assigned apps are labeled differently (shows group name) — perceive to distinguish direct vs group assignments

chain.note: Perceive Applications tab. Find target app row. Look for gear icon, X button, or 'Remove' action per row.
Click/hover on target app row to reveal actions
Perceive row-level actions. Look for gear icon dropdown or explicit Remove/Deassign button.
Click Remove. Fallbacks: 'Deassign', 'Unassign', 'Remove Assignment'. If gear icon, click gear first.
ENABLE if confirmation dialog with 'Remove Assignment' appeared.
Verify app no longer appears in user's Applications tab.
